title: eulophia penduliflora
intro: Eulophia penduliflora, also known as the pendulous eulophia, is an orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eulophia penduliflora include reducing fever, treating various infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
